channel.title: Tangent on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Tangent on Tech Tracker

item.title: PTron Tangent Lite - Best In-Ear Wireless Headphones for 599RS online !
item.description: We are now in modern wireless technology era this days world is using wireless tech products like never before due to corona virus people have to do most of thier daily works like meetings, online classes, music listening, watching movies etc… Most of the daily works require good audio earbuds if the earbuds are wireless then it will more easy, simple and convenient. We have two types of earbuds wired and wireless while wired earbuds comes with 3.
